AeroPress Original XL Portable Coffee Press

Buy for $64 (Reg. $80)

What we love

If you’re planning spring/summer camping trips, this XL AeroPress model will be much loved in any coffee lover’s kit, as it delivers a portable means to “brew up to six delicious shots of espresso style coffee or two cups of American style coffee (20 ounce/590 ml) with one press.” If the XL is too large, there’s also a standard option that sits $30 less in price, too.

items.title: Keychron’s ultra-slim customizable Apple Magic keyboard alternative is down to just $20 today (50% off)

Keychron B2 Pro Ultra-Slim Wireless Keyboard for Mac/Windows

Buy for $20 (Reg. $40)

What we love

This full-size Keychron keyboard supports 2.4GHz wireless, Bluetooth, and USB-C connectivity, and features an ultra-slim, low-profile design for a clean, minimal look. It stands out as a solid alternative to pricier models from Logitech’s MX lineup and even Apple’s Magic Keyboard, and it also allows you to customize each key using the Keychron Launcher.

items.title: Make safer cuts with Worx’s 20V JawSaw that features a retractable blade – all at a $115 yearly low (Reg. $170)
items.summary:
Amazon is offering the popular Worx 20V JawSaw Cordless Electric PowerShare Chainsaw with a 2.0Ah battery down at $115.20 shipped. You’d have to pay $170 for this model at full price, which has been up and down in price regularly over the past year, mostly keeping above $135, though recently its been dipping lower and lower as far as $119. The deal here gives you a $55 markdown off the going rate, giving you a unique and even safer cutting option over traditional chainsaws at the best price we have tracked since early August. You can find a number of the brand’s other lawn care tools at discounted rates in the official Amazon storefront here.

This more compact variant to the popular 10-inch table saw normally goes for $429 at full price, which we’ve mostly seen discounted between $329 to $349 over the last year, with that latter rate having held out from November through early February before rising back to its full price. Now, with this short-term sale, you’re getting a $115 markdown that lands it at the best price we have tracked over the last 12 months. items.title: Score the luck of the Irish with Lectric’s St. Paddy’s Day Sale and up to $694 e-bike savings starting from $799 (Ends tonight)
items.summary:
Update 3/17: As it did with its standard models, the long-range step-thru XPeak2 and LR high-step XPeak2 e-bikes have gotten price cuts to $1,599 shipped for the rest of the day.

Update 3/9: Lectric has cut the price on the standard step-thru XPeak2 and high-step XPeak2 e-bikes to $1,399 shipped during this sale

Lectric is helping you find your commuting pot of gold with its newly launched St. Paddy’s Day Sale that is taking up to $694 off its popular e-bikes and bundled gear. For folks looking to do their rainbow hunting off-road this spring, look no further than Lectric’s XPeak2 Long-Range e-bikes that come with $400 in FREE gear, in either a step-thru design at $1,699 shipped or a high-step design at $1,699 shipped. There’s also the standard step-thru XPeak2 and high-step XPeak2 e-bike options at $1,499 $1,399 shipped, which come with lesser bundles of $336 in FREE gear. Depending on which you choose, you’d be paying either $2,099 or $1,746 for these e-bike packages without the usual savings on the bundled gear. These bundles break down to include a rear cargo rack, a fender set, and an Elite headlight upgrade for the standard models, while the long-range models get those alongside a suspension seat post and water-resistant pannier bags. Head below to learn more and browse the entire e-bike lineup during this sale event.

more…

The official Sharge storefront at Amazon is offering its 3-in-1 Pouch charger for $45.02 shipped right now. This is originally a $99 unit that has more recently been sitting around the $60 mark. This particular model hasn’t seen any notable offers since the Black Friday sale besides a few Prime-exclusive deals, and today’s deal delivers a 35% markdown. This is one of the lowest prices we have tracked for this charger, and it’s now within just $6 of its all-time low. It’s a solid option to consider if you’re looking for a compact unit that can power multiple devices at once, and you can learn more about it below.

items.title: Velotric St. Patrick’s flash sale drops Nomad 2 off-road e-bike with FREE rack top bag to $1,899, more from $1,099
items.summary:
Right alongside the Summit 2 e-bike launch deal, Velotric has increased the number of e-bikes getting discounts from its Spring EV Sale for the renamed St. Patrick’s Day flash sale, which gives you up $512 in savings through the rest of the day. One new inclusion is Velotric’s Nomad 2 Everyday Off-Road Fat Tire e-bike that gets a FREE rack top bag ($96 value) at $1,899 shipped in certain frame/colorway combos. This newer model hit the market a year ago and often keeps posted up at its $1,999 full price, which would cost you $2,095 with the gear. Since its release, we’ve seen it occasionally included in major sales at $1,899 (like Black Friday), though it did dip to its $1,799 low during the short-term Cyber Monday extension of that sale. You’re getting the next-best price here during this flash event, which also happens to be its first 2026 discount, giving you $196 in total savings. Head below to learn more about it and browse the full lineup of deals before they’re gone tonight.

This is a wildly low price for what is arguably one of the most unique-looking speakers out there, and it’s now going for $3 less than its previous all-time low and our mention from last year when it briefly hit $128 ahead of the Black Friday sale.
